steps.label: Member Basic Information Entry and Record Search
steps.description: On this screen, you will enter the member's basic demographic information to begin the intake process. The system will use this data to search for existing records. Please carefully fill out all required fields. Guidance is provided for each field, and you will be notified if any information is missing or incorrectly formatted. After entering the details, you can initiate a search for existing records. If a match is found, you will be able to review and use the existing record; otherwise, you can proceed to create a new one. Instructions and contextual help are available to assist you throughout the process.

fields.label: SSN
fields.error_message: SSN is required and must be valid.

fields.label: Phone Number
fields.error_message: Phone number must be valid format.

fields.label: Email Address
fields.error_message: Email address must be valid format.

data_validation: Date of Birth cannot be in the future.
Phone number must be valid format.
If minor (under 18), guardian information is mandatory.
Email address must be valid format.
Cannot submit if required fields are missing.

buttons.label: Search for Existing Record
buttons.description: Initiates a search for existing member records using the entered demographic information.

buttons.label: Clear Form
buttons.description: Resets all fields to blank so you can start over.

actions.name: Validate Member Demographic Data
actions.implementation: Validates all required demographic fields: First Name, Last Name, Date of Birth (must not be in the future), Gender, SSN (must be unique), and Address. If member is a minor (under 18), guardian information is required. Validates phone and email formats if provided. If validation fails, triggers ACTION_3 (Handle Demographic Validation Error). If validation passes, triggers ACTION_4 (Initiate MCI Search).
actions.triggerCondition: On button: Search for Existing Record

actions.name: Clear Intake Form
actions.implementation: Resets all fields on the intake form to blank. If the form is partially completed, prompts the user for confirmation before clearing. No validation or error handling is triggered by this action.
actions.triggerCondition: On button: Clear Form

actions.name: Handle Demographic Validation Error
actions.implementation: Displays specific validation error messages to the user for missing or incorrectly formatted demographic fields, including missing guardian info for minors, duplicate SSN, invalid phone/email, or future date of birth. Prevents further processing until errors are resolved.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Member Demographic Data Failure

actions.name: Initiate MCI Search
actions.implementation: Initiates a search for existing member records in the MCI using the entered demographic information. Triggers STEP_2 (Search MCI Record).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Member Demographic Data Success

steps.label: Search MCI Record
steps.description: When the 'Search MCI' button is triggered by the Intake Specialist, the system initiates a query to the Master Client Index (MCI) using the entered demographic data. The system returns the match status and, if a match is found, the corresponding record details.

rules.label: Trigger MCI Search
rules.logic: Upon 'Search MCI' button click, use the entered demographic data to query the MCI system.

rules.label: Return Search Result
rules.logic: If the MCI system returns a result, provide the match status and record details to the Intake Specialist. If an error occurs, display the error message from the functional data.

actions.name: Evaluate MCI Search Result
actions.implementation: Evaluates the result of the MCI search. If a match is found, triggers ACTION_28 (Review Existing MCI Record). If no match is found, triggers ACTION_8 (Proceed with New MCI Record). If a system error occurs, triggers ACTION_6 (Handle MCI Search Error).
actions.triggerCondition: On rule: MCI Search Completed

actions.name: Handle MCI Search Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message to the user if the MCI search fails due to system error, and logs the error for audit purposes. Allows user to retry search or edit demographic data.
actions.triggerCondition: On rule: MCI Search Error

steps.label: MCI Record Found?
steps.description: The system evaluates the response from the MCI search to determine if a matching record exists. If a match is found, the process continues with the existing record; otherwise, a new record must be created.

rules.label: Evaluate MCI Search Status
rules.logic: If 'status' in functional data is 'success' and a matching record is present, proceed to use the existing MCI record. If 'status' is 'error' or no match is found, proceed to create a new MCI record.

actions.name: Proceed with Existing MCI Record
actions.implementation: Links intake to the existing MCI record and pre-fills intake fields with available MCI data. Navigates to domain-specific intake data entry (STEP_6).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Review Existing MCI Record Confirmed

actions.name: Proceed with New MCI Record
actions.implementation: Initiates creation of a new record in MCI and proceeds to domain-specific intake data entry. Triggers STEP_5 (Create New MCI Record).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Evaluate MCI Search Result - No Match Found

steps.label: Use Existing MCI Record
steps.description: If a matching MCI record is found, the system links the intake process to the existing MCI record and populates all available data fields from the MCI into the intake form.

rules.label: Link to Existing Record
rules.logic: If 'status' is 'success' and a matching record is found, associate the intake with the existing MCI record and pre-fill intake fields with available MCI data.

actions.name: Link Intake to Existing MCI Record
actions.implementation: Links the intake process to the existing MCI record and pre-fills intake fields with available MCI data. Navigates to STEP_6 (Domain-Specific Intake Data Entry).
actions.triggerCondition: On rule: Intake Linked to Existing MCI Record

steps.label: Create New MCI Record
steps.description: If no matching MCI record is found, the system creates a new client record in the MCI using the demographic data provided by the Intake Specialist.

rules.label: Create New Record
rules.logic: If 'status' is 'error' or no match is found in the MCI, initiate the creation of a new MCI record using the entered demographic data.

actions.name: Create New MCI Record
actions.implementation: Creates a new client record in the MCI using the entered demographic data. Checks for duplicate SSN and other validation failures before creation. If creation is successful, navigates to STEP_6 (Domain-Specific Intake Data Entry). If creation fails due to duplicate SSN or other errors, triggers ACTION_11 (Handle MCI Record Creation Error).
actions.triggerCondition: On rule: Create New MCI Record

actions.name: Handle MCI Record Creation Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message to the user if the creation of a new MCI record fails due to system error, duplicate SSN, or other validation failures. Logs the error for audit purposes. Allows user to edit demographic data and retry.
actions.triggerCondition: On rule: MCI Record Creation Error

steps.label: Domain-Specific Intake Data Entry
steps.description: This screen allows you to enter additional intake information specific to the member's domain or program. You will see sections for program selection, eligibility details, and any special circumstances. Please review all instructions and provide complete and accurate information. Some sections may be repeatable if the member is involved in multiple programs or has multiple eligibility criteria. Contextual help and validation messages will guide you to ensure all required data is entered correctly before finalizing the intake.
data_validation: Enrollment Date cannot be in the future.
Cannot enroll in the same program more than once.
If Eligibility Status is 'Not Eligible', reason must be provided in Special Circumstances.
Supporting Documents must be in PDF, DOC, or image format.
Total number of program enrollments cannot exceed 5.

buttons.label: Finalize Intake
buttons.description: Validates and submits all intake data, updates member status, and triggers notification scheduling.

buttons.label: Save Draft
buttons.description: Saves the entered data as a draft for later completion.

actions.name: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data
actions.implementation: Validates all domain-specific intake data: Enrollment Date not in the future, no duplicate program enrollments, total enrollments not exceeding 5, if Eligibility Status is 'Not Eligible' then Special Circumstances is required, and supporting documents are in allowed formats. If validation fails, triggers corresponding error handling actions (ACTION_14-18). If validation passes, triggers ACTION_20 (Proceed to Intake Submission).
actions.triggerCondition: On button: Finalize Intake

actions.name: Save Intake Draft
actions.implementation: Saves the entered intake data as a draft in persistent storage associated with the current user/session. If saving fails, triggers ACTION_19 (Handle Intake Draft Save Error). Partial data is saved and can be retrieved by the user from the 'Drafts' section on login or intake dashboard.
actions.triggerCondition: On button: Save Draft

actions.name: Handle Enrollment Date Validation Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if Enrollment Date is in the future and prevents submission. Allows user to correct the date.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data - Enrollment Date Failure

actions.name: Handle Duplicate Program Enrollment Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if the member is already enrolled in the selected program and prevents submission. Allows user to select a different program or edit enrollments.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data - Duplicate Program Enrollment

actions.name: Handle Program Enrollment Limit Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if the total number of program enrollments exceeds 5 and prevents submission. Allows user to remove or edit enrollments.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data - Program Enrollment Limit Exceeded

actions.name: Handle Eligibility Status Reason Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if Eligibility Status is 'Not Eligible' and no reason is provided in Special Circumstances. Allows user to enter the required reason.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data - Missing Reason for Not Eligible

actions.name: Handle File Upload Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if supporting documents are not in allowed formats (PDF, DOC, image) or if file upload fails. Allows user to retry upload.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data - File Upload Failure

actions.name: Handle Intake Draft Save Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message if saving the intake draft fails due to system error. Allows user to retry saving or download draft locally.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Save Intake Draft Failure

actions.name: Proceed to Intake Submission
actions.implementation: If all domain-specific intake validations pass, triggers STEP_7 (Finalize and Submit Intake).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate Domain-Specific Intake Data Success

steps.label: Finalize and Submit Intake
steps.description: When the Intake Specialist clicks the 'Finalize Intake' button, the system validates all collected intake data, submits the information, updates the member's status, and triggers notification scheduling. The system also generates audit logs and compliance documentation as part of the submission process.

rules.label: Validate and Submit Intake
rules.logic: On 'Finalize Intake' button click, validate all intake data. If validation passes, submit the data, update member status, and schedule client notifications. Generate audit logs and compliance documentation. If an error occurs, display the error message from the functional data.

actions.name: Validate All Intake Data
actions.implementation: Performs comprehensive validation of all intake data, including demographic and domain-specific fields. If validation fails, triggers ACTION_23 (Handle Intake Submission Error). If validation passes, triggers ACTION_22 (Submit Intake Data).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Proceed to Intake Submission

actions.name: Submit Intake Data
actions.implementation: Submits validated intake data to the system, updates member status, and triggers ACTION_24 (Generate Audit Log and Compliance Documentation). If submission fails, triggers ACTION_23 (Handle Intake Submission Error).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate All Intake Data Success

actions.name: Handle Intake Submission Error
actions.implementation: Displays error message to the user if intake submission fails due to system error, and logs the error for audit purposes. Allows user to retry submission or save as draft.
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Validate All Intake Data Failure or Submit Intake Data Failure

actions.name: Generate Audit Log and Compliance Documentation
actions.implementation: Generates audit logs for the intake submission, recording all relevant actions and changes for compliance purposes. Also generates and stores compliance documentation as required by policy and regulations. If successful, triggers ACTION_25 (Schedule Client Notification).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Submit Intake Data Success

actions.name: Schedule Client Notification
actions.implementation: Schedules automated client notifications regarding intake status to be sent daily at 2:00 AM. Triggers STEP_8 (Automated Client Notification).
actions.triggerCondition: On action: Generate Audit Log and Compliance Documentation Success
